_readme: Confluence MCP server configuration. Store credentials in environment variables.

_setup.3_note: Same API token as Jira — both are Atlassian products

_tools_provided: confluence_search — full-text CQL search across spaces
confluence_get_page — fetch a page by ID or title + space key
confluence_create_page — create a new page in a space
confluence_update_page — update an existing page's content
confluence_get_children — list child pages of a parent
confluence_add_comment — add an inline or page comment
_skill_pairings: skills/manager/sprint-retrospective — writes retro outcomes to Confluence
skills/cross-cutting/context-engineering — reads project context from Confluence
